label: COLLAR members Candy and Ivy So launch solo careers with debut singles
label_zh: COLLAR成員Candy及So I-vey展開個人事業，並推出首張單曲

timeline.title: COLLAR Icons Candy Wong and Ivy So Debut Solo Singles Amidst Intense Industry Fanfare
timeline.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 與 Ivy So 隆重推出個人單曲，掀起業界熱潮
timeline.sub_title: Members of Hong Kong girl group COLLAR, Candy Wong and Ivy So, have officially entered the solo market with simultaneous ballad releases, marking a significant expansion for the group.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 香港女子組合 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 正式進軍樂壇，同步推出抒情歌曲，標誌著組合的重大發展。
timeline.summary:
The Hong Kong music industry has been set abuzz by the simultaneous solo debuts of COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So. Following in the footsteps of their teammates Marf Yau, Winka Chan, Sumling Li, and Day Hui, the two idols—often referred to as the group’s 'Goddesses'—have officially launched their individual careers with the release of their first singles. This coordinated [ref:7, 4, 8, 2] launch, colloquially dubbed the 'Fairy War' by local media, represents a major milestone for the group as it enters its fourth year of activity, showcasing the diverse talents and personal growth of its members.

Candy Wong’s debut single, titled 'Straightforward' (直白), features lyrics by the renowned lyricist Wyman Wong. The track is a [ref:7, 8, 2] poignant slow ballad that utilizes a romantic narrative to explore the importance of direct communication in all relationships. Candy shared that while the music video’s story is not a personal experience, the song reflects her own simple and direct character. She noted that the [ref:7] track serves as a personal reminder to be more open with her family, expressing feelings of love and gratitude that she previously found difficult to voice. The choice of a 'soft' debut marks a departure from the high-energy dance tracks typically associated with COLLAR, allowing her vocal clarity to take center stage.

Simultaneously, Ivy So released her first single, 'Give You a Big Mouth Boy' (給你一隻大口仔), also known as 'SMILE (Not For Sale).' In a significant move for her artistic [ref:7, 8, 4, 2] development, Ivy participated in the songwriting process as a lyricist for the first time. The song’s title is a playful nod to her well-known nickname among fans, 'Big Mouth So,' which she has come to embrace as a symbol of her cheerful personality. Ivy described the track as a source [ref:7, 4, 8] of comfort and warmth, intended to make listeners feel embraced and cared for during difficult times. She admitted that the process of conceptualizing [ref:7] her solo identity was challenging, involving numerous revisions to the lyrics to ensure the song truly represented her 'deep down' self.

Despite the competitive nature of simultaneous releases, the two members have emphasized their mutual support. Throughout the production process—from [ref:7] selecting tracks to recording and filming music videos—Candy and Ivy remained in close contact, even hosting a joint 'Canvy' Instagram Live session on the night of the release to watch their videos with fans. They expressed that having each other's company during this transition helped alleviate the immense pressure of living up to the successful solo tracks previously released by other COLLAR members.

Industry analysts view these debuts as a strategic move to solidify COLLAR's dominance in the Canto-pop scene following their sweep of major awards in 2025. By choosing ballads over dance-pop, both Candy and Ivy have successfully showcased their versatility as vocalists, further broadening the group's appeal. As the singles begin their ascent on the charts [ref:7, 8, 2], the focus now turns to upcoming promotional events and potential live performances where the two will balance their solo duties with group activities.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港樂壇因 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 的同步個人出道而熱鬧非凡。繼隊友 Marf Yau、Winka Chan、Sumling Li 和 Day Hui 之後，這兩位被譽為組合 '女神' 的偶像，正式發行了她們的首支單曲，開啟了個人演藝生涯。這次協調一致的發佈，被本地媒體戲稱為 '仙女戰爭'，對於進入第四個活動年份的組合來說，是一個重要的里程碑，展現了成員們多樣化的才華和個人成長。[ref:7, 4, 8, 2]

Candy Wong 的出道單曲名為《直白》(Straightforward)，歌詞由著名填詞人黃偉文操刀。這首歌曲是一首感人至深的慢板抒情曲，透過浪漫的敘事探討在所有關係中直接溝通的重要性。Candy 分享說，雖然音樂錄影帶的故事並非個人經歷，但歌曲反映了她自己簡單直接的性格。她指出，這首歌提醒她要更向家人表達愛與感激，這些情感她過去難以啟齒。選擇 '柔和' 的出道方式，標誌著與 COLLAR 通常的高能量舞曲風格的區別，讓她清晰的唱功成為焦點。[ref:7, 8, 2]

與此同時，Ivy So 發布了她的第一支單曲《給你一隻大口仔》，又名《SMILE (Not For Sale)》。作為她藝術發展的重要一步，Ivy 首次參與了歌曲創作，擔任填詞人。歌曲的標題是對她粉絲間廣為人知的暱稱 '大口 So' 的俏皮致敬，她已將此視為自己開朗個性的象徵。Ivy 將這首歌描述為一種舒適和溫暖的來源，旨在讓聽眾在困難時期感到被擁抱和關懷。她承認，構思個人身份的過程充滿挑戰，歌詞經過多次修改，以確保歌曲真正代表她 '內心深處' 的自我。[ref:7, 8, 4, 2]

儘管同步發行競爭激烈，兩位成員仍強調了彼此的支持。在整個製作過程中，從選曲到錄音和拍攝音樂錄影帶，Candy 和 Ivy 保持緊密聯繫，甚至在發行當晚共同進行了 'Canvy' Instagram 直播，與粉絲一起觀看她們的 MV。她們表示，在這一過渡時期彼此的陪伴，幫助緩解了人們對她們的個人單曲必須與 COLLAR 其他成員成功的個人歌曲媲美的巨大壓力。[ref:7]

業內分析人士認為，這次出道是 COLLAR 在 2025 年橫掃各大獎項後，鞏固其在粵語流行樂壇主導地位的戰略舉措。通過選擇抒情歌曲而非舞曲，Candy 和 Ivy 都成功展示了她們作為歌手的多樣性，進一步拓寬了組合的吸引力。隨著單曲開始在排行榜上攀升，現在的焦點轉向即將到來的宣傳活動和可能的現場表演，屆時兩人將平衡她們的個人職責與組合的活動。[ref:7, 8, 2]

timeline.title: COLLAR Stars Candy and Ivy So Ignite Cantopop Scene With Highly Anticipated Solo Debut Singles
timeline.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Candy 和 Ivy So 攜備受期待的個人出道單曲點燃粵語流行樂壇
timeline.sub_title: Following their joint release on March 12, members Candy and Ivy So have transitioned into solo territory, marking a significant strategic evolution for MakerVille’s flagship girl group.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 繼 3 月 12 日聯合發行後，成員 Candy 和 Ivy So 已轉向個人發展，標誌著 MakerVille 旗艦女子組合的重大戰略演變。
timeline.summary:
The Hong Kong music landscape reached a significant milestone as COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So officially launched their solo careers on March 12, 2026. The debut, marketed under the popular collaborative "Canvy" moniker, featured the simultaneous release of two distinct singles: Candy’s introspective track "直白" (Direct) and Ivy So’s playful, high-energy anthem "給你一隻大口仔" (Give You a Big-Mouthed Boy). This dual launch represents a pivotal phase in COLLAR’s development, utilizing a "solo-within-a-group" strategy that allows individual members to explore personal artistic identities while the seven-member collective continues its dominant run in the industry.

To celebrate the release, the duo hosted a high-profile Instagram Live session yesterday evening, inviting thousands of dedicated supporters to a virtual "MV premiere party." During the broadcast, Candy and Ivy shared intimate behind-the-scenes stories from their respective recording sessions and music video shoots. Candy, who has often been categorized as the group's "visual" member, demonstrated remarkable vocal maturity in "直白." The track serves as a testament to her technical growth following months of intensive vocal training with renowned producer Mike Orange. Fans noted her improved range and emotional delivery [ref:1], which many described as a "graduation" from her early idol days into a serious recording artist.

Simultaneously, Ivy So’s debut single, "給你一隻大口仔," has captivated audiences with its infectious energy and vibrant visual aesthetics. The song reinforces Ivy’s reputation as one of the most charismatic [ref:1] performers in contemporary Cantopop, blending catchy hooks with a persona that fans—collectively known as "Nights"—have embraced since her time on the reality show King Maker IV. The music video’s art direction and styling have already sparked trends on social [ref:1] media, with listeners praising the production quality and the playful narrative that aligns perfectly with her public image.

Public reception has been overwhelmingly positive, with both music videos quickly climbing the trending charts on local streaming platforms and YouTube. On discussion forums such as LIHKG, the release has been framed as a friendly "Canvy Battle," a promotional concept that has successfully drummed up engagement from both individual fan bases. Critics have highlighted the complementary nature of the two releases; while Candy explores a sophisticated pop-ballad sound, Ivy leans into the upbeat dance-pop territory that has become a staple of the COLLAR brand. This strategic diversification is seen as a move to broaden the group’s demographic reach and solidify their individual marketability.

Looking ahead, the momentum is expected to continue with a dedicated fan meeting scheduled for Saturday, March 14, 2026. This event will provide the first opportunity for fans to interact directly with the members [ref:1] regarding their solo endeavors. As COLLAR continues to evolve, the successful transition of Candy and Ivy into solo work—following the paths previously blazed by members like Marf and Winka—signals a new era for the group. By fostering individual stars within a cohesive unit, MakerVille is successfully rebranding COLLAR from a reality-show-formed act into a multi-faceted powerhouse of versatile entertainers.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港樂壇在 2026 年 3 月 12 日迎來重要里程碑，COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 正式展開個人演藝生涯。這次以廣受歡迎的合作「Canvy」名義進行的出道，同時發行了兩首風格迥異的單曲：Candy 的內省之作《直白》（Direct），以及 Ivy So 充滿活力、節奏明快的歌曲《給你一隻大口仔》（Give You a Big-Mouthed Boy）。這次雙重發行標誌著 COLLAR 發展的一個關鍵階段，採用了「團體內的個人發展」策略，讓每位成員都能探索個人藝術身份，同時七人組合將繼續在業界保持其主導地位。

為了慶祝這次發行，兩人昨日晚間舉辦了一場備受矚目的 Instagram 直播，邀請了數千名忠實粉絲參加虛擬「MV 首播派對」。在直播中，Candy 和 Ivy 分享了她們各自錄音室和音樂錄影帶拍攝期間的許多幕後故事。Candy，常被歸類為組合的「門面」成員，在《直白》中展現了驚人的聲樂成熟度。這首歌曲證明了她在與著名製作人 Mike Orange 進行數月密集聲樂訓練後，在技術上的顯著進步。粉絲們注意到她聲音的音域擴展和情感表達的提升，許多人形容這是她從早期偶像階段「畢業」，成為一名認真錄音藝術家的標誌。[ref:1]

同時，Ivy So 的出道單曲《給你一隻大口仔》以其感染力的活力和鮮豔的視覺美學俘獲了觀眾。這首歌鞏固了 Ivy 作為當代粵語流行樂壇最具魅力的表演者之一的聲譽，融合了朗朗上口的旋律和自她參加選秀節目《Making Star King Maker IV》以來粉絲（統稱為「Nights」）所喜愛的個人風格。音樂錄影帶的藝術指導和造型已經在社交媒體上引發了潮流，聽眾們稱讚其製作質量以及與她公眾形象完美契合的俏皮敘事。[ref:1]

公眾的反應是壓倒性的正面，兩首音樂錄影帶迅速登上本地串流媒體平台和 YouTube 的熱門排行榜。在 LIHKG 等討論區，這次發行被描繪成一場友好的「Canvy 大戰」，這一宣傳概念成功地引起了雙方粉絲群的熱烈參與。評論家們強調了這兩首作品的互補性；Candy 探索的是精緻的流行抒情曲風，而 Ivy 則偏向於已成為 COLLAR 品牌標誌的 upbeat 舞曲風格。這種戰略性的多元化被視為擴大組合的受眾群體並鞏固其個人市場吸引力的一步。

展望未來，預計這一勢頭將在 2026 年 3 月 14 日星期六舉行的專屬粉絲見面會上持續。這次活動將是粉絲們首次有機會就她們的個人發展與成員們進行直接交流。隨著 COLLAR 持續發展，Candy 和 Ivy 在繼 Marf 和 Winka 等成員開闢的道路後成功轉型為個人發展，標誌著組合的新時代。通過在一個協調一致的團體中培養獨立明星，MakerVille 成功地將 COLLAR 從一個選秀節目組成的團體，重新定位為一個多才多藝的藝人強大組合。[ref:1]

timeline.title: COLLAR Members Candy Wong and Ivy So Officially Launch Solo Careers with Concurrent Debut Singles
timeline.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Wong Candy 與 So Ivy 正式以同步單曲發佈開啟個人事業
timeline.sub_title: The two popular stars released 'Straightforward' and 'Giving You a Big Mouth Boy' to radio today, leaving leader Gao as the group's final member to debut solo.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 這對人氣香港女子組合的視覺擔當今日同時推出個人單曲「Frank」與「Give You a Big Mouth Boy」，標誌著組合發展的重要里程碑。
timeline.summary:
The Hong Kong music scene reached a significant milestone today, March 12, 2026, as COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So officially transitioned into solo artistry. Following a year of intense speculation and a high-profile announcement on March 11, the two singers released their debut singles, 'Straightforward' and 'Giving You a Big Mouth Boy,' to major radio stations across the territory. [ref:5, 1, 2] This dual launch has been dubbed the 'Battle of the Fairies' by local media and fans, highlighting the immense popularity of both performers, who are widely regarded as the 'visual' centers of the seven-member girl group.

Candy Wong’s debut track, 'Straightforward,' represents a departure from her early group persona, leaning into a more mature and resilient image. Music [ref:1, 2] industry insiders have noted that the song highlights her steady vocal growth, a journey that became evident during COLLAR's 'GAME ON' concert series in late 2025. Producers [ref:5, 1, 3] previously described Candy as having a 'warrior-like' determination, a trait she has channeled into this new project. The [ref:5, 1, 3, 2] single's production focuses on candid storytelling, matching its title by exploring themes of self-discovery and the challenges of being under the public's constant scrutiny during the group’s first four years.

Simultaneously, Ivy So has embraced her playful side with 'Giving You a Big Mouth Boy.' The title [ref:1, 2] is a direct and affectionate nod to her famous nickname and the cheerful personality that has made her a fan favorite. Despite [ref:1, 4] the lighthearted title, the track showcases her vocal range and the physical discipline she has maintained. Leading [ref:5, 1, 3, 2] up to the release, Ivy and Candy shared a teaser video on social media that showcased their toned physiques, signaling that their solo ventures would be defined by both artistic and physical 'strength.' Fans have [ref:5, 1, 2] flooded social media platforms with positive feedback, praising Ivy for her ability to maintain her signature charm while delivering a polished solo performance.

With these two debuts, COLLAR has entered a new phase of its evolution. Out of the [ref:1, 2] seven members who debuted in early 2022, six have now officially launched solo careers, including Marf, Winka, Day, and Sumling. This leaves [ref:5, 1, 2] only the group’s leader, Gao, as the remaining member without a solo single. Gao has been [ref:5, 1, 2] highly supportive of her teammates, even jokingly suggesting a remix of both song titles on social media. The group recently [ref:5, 1, 2] celebrated their fourth anniversary in January 2026 with a massive 'Sign-and-Sing' event, where hints about the upcoming solo projects first began to surface.

Industry analysts suggest that MakerVille’s decision to release both singles on the same day is a strategic move to capitalize on the competitive yet friendly rivalry between the members’ fanbases. This 'Battle of the [ref:1] Fairies' has successfully dominated entertainment headlines, ensuring that COLLAR remains at the forefront of the Canto-pop industry. As the group continues [ref:1, 2] to balance collective activities with individual growth, the successful launch of Candy and Ivy’s solo paths sets a strong precedent for the remaining developments in COLLAR's 2026 roadmap.
timeline.summary_zh:
今日，香港樂壇掀起熱潮，COLLAR 成員 Wong Candy 與 So Ivy 正式展開了她們向個人藝術家發展的轉型。這兩位長期被視為人氣女子組合「視覺 icon」的成員，於2026年3月12日同步發佈了她們的首張個人單曲。Ivy So 推出了她的第一首音樂作品「Give You a Big Mouth Boy」，而 Wong Candy 則揭曉了她的個人出道曲「Frank」。這次同步發佈被粉絲和本地媒體戲稱為「仙子之戰」，是對她們在同一天展開競爭但又友好關係的一種幽默稱呼。[ref:2]

同時發佈單曲的決定在 Cantopop 社群中引起了極大的關注。粉絲們注意到了兩位偶像在藝術方向上的鮮明對比。Ivy So 的出道曲被描述為具有活潑且充滿活力的風格，與粉絲們喜愛的她本人形象相符。相對地，Wong Candy 的「Frank」則探索了這位年輕歌手更內省和真誠的一面，展現了她自首次亮相選秀節目《King Maker IV》以來的歌唱進步。兩位藝人均投入數月時間進行聲樂訓練和體能準備，以確保她們的個人出道能夠達到粉絲們的高度期望。[ref:2, 6, 3]

這次同步出道不僅是兩位歌手個人的成就，更是 COLLAR 整個組合向前邁出的重要一步。隨著這些單曲的發佈，組合七名成員中幾乎所有人都已在團體活動之外建立了個人音樂事業。根據最近 CR2 電台預告片的報導，目前僅有隊長 Gao 尚未發佈個人單曲。這種策略性的推廣表明，該組合有意多元化其產品線，以期在即將到來的2026年頒獎季中，無論是團體還是個人都取得主導地位。[ref:5, 2, 4, 1]

儘管排行榜競爭激烈，組合內部的支持依然強勁。隊長 Gao 本週早些時候對她的隊友們表達了興奮之情，甚至幽默地提議將兩首歌名混合創作一首「混音」歌曲，以示中立支持。此前，成員們在社交媒體上通過一段聯合舞蹈視頻預告了這些個人項目，展示了她們在準備個人 MV 拍攝時所經歷的嚴格訓練和「肌肉鍛鍊」。這種情誼有助於平息任何內部競爭的傳言，強調這次雙重發佈是對組合集體才華的一次慶祝。[ref:2, 1]

行業分析師預計，Candy 和 Ivy 都將成為各大「最佳新人」獎項的有力競爭者，進一步鞏固 COLLAR 在香港娛樂產業的強勢地位。隨著這些單曲今日開始在各大電台播出，粉絲們正熱切期待完整音樂錄影帶和現場表演的發佈。這次雙重發佈標誌著組合的一個新篇章，突顯了儘管她們仍是一個緊密的集體，但每位成員都擁有獨特的音樂願景，準備在個人舞台上進行探索。[ref:2]
